creator: dabo@devconsole.de
text:
Hi Ruslan,

that's strange. I didn't set the PYTHON_DEFAULT_VERSION variable in =
make.conf. So it seems that the python port didn't build correctly on my =
machine. I now deleted the python2 symlink and did a make reinstall for =
the python27 port. Now the symlink was created automatically. Don't know =
why that was not case last time.
So everything is fine! :)
Can be closed.
Thank you!

---
Regards
Daniel

Am 18.05.2013 um 08:04 schrieb Ruslan Makhmatkhanov <cvs-src@yandex.ru>:

> Hi Daniel,
>=20
> Daniel Boggasch wrote on 17.05.2013 17:28:
>> =3D=3D=3D>  Building for fusefs-exfat-1.0.0
>> env: python2: No such file or directory
>> *** [do-build] Error code 127
>>=20
>> Stop in /usr/ports/sysutils/fusefs-exfat.
>>=20
>> root@nexus:/usr/ports # which python2
>> python2: Command not found.
>=20
> Looks like something with your particular system, because I can't =
reproduce this both with clean install, and after python upgrade 2.7.3 =
-> 2.7.5. I have python2 symlink in both cases. Did you do something =
with PYTHON_DEFAULT_VERSION in make.conf or something?
>=20
> --=20
> Regards,
> Ruslan
>=20
> Tinderboxing kills... the drives.
